note: Honest coverage frontier. status: present = a runnable step drives real code and passes (must name a test); pending = specified behavior whose implementation (core/regime.Engine + modules/actuation/awxjob, Phase 2) does not exist yet; retrospective_gap = shipped without a driving test (must be zero for governed behavior, INV-22). This is the SDD DESIGN GATE (TG-110): NO code is built yet, so every scenario is pending. Scenarios bind to real code as tasks T-017-* land (AWX-job actuator first, after the resolver core + lane seam).

scenarios.name: A target resolves to exactly one regime and its lane
An unknown regime falls back to the default lane or refuses and an ambiguous regime fails closed
Every lane is reachable only through the actuation interceptor chain
Regime resolution matches on the same estate object-model as policy and credential
The AWX-job actuator launches only an allowlisted policy-authorized template
The AWX-job effect is a template plus typed extra_vars and rejects unknown keys
The AWX-job lane resolves the token after policy and launches only while the mode chokepoint permits
A read-only setup job is a sensor and a mutating template stays off until the flip
The AWX token is a sealed SecretRef and the sensor token is read-only and distinct
An async actuation returns a job handle and is polled to a terminal state
The launch is a prediction verified against the terminal outcome and fed to the graduation ladder
A launched but unverified job counts as no clean run and times out to unverified
A second launch for the same action_id is refused
The knowledge lane ingests templates and inventory read-only re-read by id
The knowledge lane launches nothing and only proposes a runbook
Every resolution launch and verdict is appended to the ledger with no secret and the tables are append-only
The console renders the regime map allowlist pending-verification queue and lane coverage
Every allowlist edit is appended to the tamper-evident ledger
The native-ssh lane can resolve its effect leaf per action target
